title: Persona for a Social Media Influencer
scenario: Create a persona for a popular social media influencer specializing in beauty and fashion. The target output should be a detailed persona description.
constraints: Must include a brief description of the influencer's personal style
Must highlight the influencer's values and goals

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the constraints met (personal style, values, goals)?
Does the description showcase a friendly and approachable tone?
Does the description accurately answer the prompt regarding the influencer's specialization?
